test-method.name: testCreateMinorPatientWithAddressAndPrimaryContact
test-method.description: TC_P08 – Create minor patient (DOB < 18) with Address Info and Primary Contact details

exception.message: TC_P08 FAIL – Form should close after saving minor patient with Address Information and Primary Contact details. expected [false] but found [true]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: TC_P08 FAIL – Form should close after saving minor patient with Address Information and Primary Contact details. expected [false] but found [true]
